calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-29-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Bryn Davies appeared via zoom for Elaine Kutz (administrator).

Ms. Davies stated that the parties have come to a settlement agreement, that the three stocks are of low value, and that all three stocks should be evenly distributed. Amended petition for settlement of estate is taken under submission with the intent to grant as discussed.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
